build.buildCommand: if [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "morlo-web" ] || [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "makeyourmusic-web" ]; then npm ci --prefix shared && npm ci --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend; else cd backend && npm ci && npx prisma generate --schema=../prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build; fi

deploy.preDeployCommand: if [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "morlo-web" ] || [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "makeyourmusic-web" ]; then echo "Skipping database sync for web service"; else cd backend && npx prisma db push --schema=../prisma/schema.prisma --skip-generate --accept-data-loss; fi
deploy.startCommand: if [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "morlo-web" ] || [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "makeyourmusic-web" ]; then cd frontend && npm start -- -p $PORT; else cd backend && npm start; fi
